scripts.dev: cd echo-presence-ai && bun install && bun run dev
scripts.build: cd echo-presence-ai && bun install && bun run build && cd .. && rm -rf dist && cp -r echo-presence-ai/dist dist
scripts.build:dev: cd echo-presence-ai && bun install && bun run build:dev && cd .. && rm -rf dist && cp -r echo-presence-ai/dist dist
